headline: How The Kinsale Capital Group (KNSL) Story Is Shifting As Growth Slows And EPS Holds Up
summary: Kinsale Capital Group just saw its fair value estimate trimmed from US$433.40 to US$422.40, a modest reset that puts fresh numbers around what some analysts think the shares are worth. That shift lines up with recent research that mixes confidence in profitability with caution around slower premium growth and sector headwinds, and has led several firms to lower price targets even while maintaining constructive views on execution. Read on to see how you can track these evolving calls and what...
